## What's Wrong

If you have a specific suggestion, describe it here. Even a rough idea is helpful.

## Your Background
This helps us calibrate the documentation level:
- [ ] I'm new to embedded / hardware development
- [ ] I have some experience with microcontrollers
- [ ] I'm an experienced embedded engineer
